_comment:
Barometer ground-pressure reset. Vehicle must be on the ground and still; the autopilot zeroes the baro reference at the current altitude so subsequent climb / descent reports are relative to launch.

Fast procedure (typically < 5s). The two recoverable failure kinds both route to `holdStill` because motion / vibration is the only operator-side cause the recipe can prompt for — pressure noise from wind or strong HVAC is environmental and surfaces through the `any` matcher with the underlying detail.

Overall budget is 30s — generous for the procedure plus a single retry of operator setup.
Auto-retries (timeout / noSession / autopilotBusy) are handled by the catalogue's default retry policy on the dispatch itself, so the matchers below only see the *final* outcome.

then.detail: Barometer calibration failed with an unhandled outcome — see the audit trace for the underlying response.
